name: Pumpkin Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat together the milk, canned pumpkin, eggs, and oil (if using).
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Heat a griddle or large pan over medium heat.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the griddle for each pancake.
6. Cook the pancakes until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to look set, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook the other side until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes more.
8. Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
